allow: PowerShell($git = "C:\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"; cd d:\\selfcode; & $git init; Write-Host "Git repo initialized")
PowerShell($git = "C:\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"; cd d:\\selfcode; & $git branch -m main; & $git add .; & $git commit -m "Initial commit: personal portfolio website")

PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Git\\cmd;" + $env:Path; cd d:\\selfcode; $git = "C:\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"; git config --global http.proxy http://127.0.0.1:7890 2>&1; git config --global https.proxy http://127.0.0.1:7890 2>&1; Write-Host "Proxy set")
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Git\\cmd;" + $env:Path; $git = "C:\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"; cd d:\\selfcode; npx gh-pages -d out 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Git\\cmd;" + $env:Path; $git = "C:\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"; cd d:\\selfcode\\out; & $git init; & $git checkout -b gh-pages; & $git add .; & $git commit -m "Deploy"; & $git remote add origin https://github.com/transgenderlgbt5000-hue/selfcode.git; & $git push -f origin gh-pages 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Git\\cmd;" + $env:Path; cd d:\\selfcode; git config --global --unset http.proxy 2>$null; git config --global --unset https.proxy 2>$null; cd d:\\selfcode\\out; $git = "C:\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"; & $git remote remove origin 2>$null; & $git remote add origin https://github.com/transgenderlgbt5000-hue/selfcode.git; & $git push -f origin gh-pages 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Git\\cmd;" + $env:Path; $git = "C:\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"; cd d:\\selfcode\\out; for \($i=0; $i -lt 5; $i++\) { Write-Host "Attempt $\($i+1\)..."; $result = & $git push -f origin gh-pages 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { Write-Host "SUCCESS!"; break } Write-Host "Retry in 5s..."; Start-Sleep 5 })
PowerShell($env:HTTPS_PROXY = ""; $env:HTTP_PROXY = ""; cd d:\\selfcode; npx wrangler pages deploy out --project-name=selfcode --commit-dirty=true 2>&1)
